positive: Minimalist celestial creature silhouette, a fusion of a majestic owl and a soaring phoenix, rendered in deep indigo and gold foil accents against a textured cream background. The owl's feathered wings seamlessly transition into phoenix flames in a graceful, upward curve, creating a dynamic, symmetrical central composition. Include subtle constellations visible in the surrounding negative space. Perfect for screen printing on fabric. High contrast, clean lines, vector art style, ornate geometric elements, ethereal glow, highly detailed, art deco influences, central focus.
negative: blur, ugly, low contrast, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, oversaturated, photographic, 3d render
